_note: Per-domain style fragments, merged in THIS ORDER by HelmShell.buildStyle() at load. Order == draw order (bottom layer first). The merge of helm-base + these fragments is byte-equivalent to the legacy web/style.json. To add map layers for your epic: create a helm-<epic>-*.json fragment (namespace every source/layer id helm-<epic>-*) and insert its filename here at the right draw position. See web/SHELL.md.
